articles.title: American Idol Reunion: Judges Paula Abdul and Randy Jackson back after 20 years
articles.description: Original American Idol judges Paula Abdul and Randy Jackson reunited after 20 years for a special 'Class of 2006' themed episode. While Simon Cowell was absent, Paula joined the current judging panel, and Randy mentored the top five finalists. Their return celebrated two decades of the show's iconic moments and talent discovery.

articles.title: Why Blake Lively, Justin Baldoni reached settlement? Stars give key update on It Ends With Us lawsuit
articles.description: Blake Lively and Justin Baldoni have settled their high-profile legal dispute, ending a yearslong battle over allegations of sexual harassment.

articles.title: Mukesh recalls fallout with Hera Pheri producer; praises Akshay
articles.description: Mukesh Khanna has opened up about missing out on Hera Pheri 2, revealing he was never approached for the sequel despite being part of the cult original. The veteran actor said, “No, I wasn’t approached. And I don’t regret it. If I’m asked, I’ll do it... everyone else was repeated, but I wasn’t.” While he praised Akshay Kumar's dedication, he admitted that he has publicly criticised some of Akshay’s choices in the past, including Laxmii.

articles.title: Blake Lively-Justin Baldoni Settle Legal Dispute After Almost Two Years
articles.description: It Ends With Us stars Blake Lively and Justin Baldoni have finally ended their legal dispute after almost two years. Their lawyers issued a statement and informed media that the duo settled their legal matter before the trial begins.

articles.title: Post poll debacle, Pinarayi Vijayan resigns as Kerala chief minister
articles.description: Thiruvananthapuram: Following LDF's defeat in the assembly elections, chief minister Pinarayi Vijayan has tendered his resignation to governor Rajendr.

articles.title: Candace Owens-Laura Loomer doxxing: Is Loomer's fiance helping? ‘Andrew Jacob Simpson’ claim comes up
articles.description: Candace Owens has accused Laura Loomer of doxxing her and said that the latter's fiance is helping her in this endeavor, naming one Andrew 'Jacob' Simpson.

articles.title: Quote of the day by Franz Kafka: 'It is my father's first time on this Earth, too. And I know he had it worse as a child. But...' - Why childhood wounds echo through families and never fully disappear explained by the Jewish novelist
articles.description: Franz Kafka’s quote of the day highlights the emotional complexity of family relationships by recognising that both parents and children experience life with their own struggles, limitations, and misunderstandings. It reflects a layered perspective where a father is seen not as an all-knowing authority but as a human being navigating life for the first time, while also acknowledging the generational cycle of hardship that can shape behaviour across time.

articles.title: Assembly election results: Blockbuster debut! Vijay Tamil Nadu's Gen-nayagan
articles.description: Tamil Nadu's political landscape is witnessing the rise of a new superstar in actor Vijay, mirroring MGR's trajectory. Despite a contrasting on-screen persona, Vijay's unconventional campaign, leveraging social media and a direct voter appeal, has positioned him as a formidable force. He has emerged from the shadows of established parties, capturing public imagination and potentially reshaping the state's political future.

articles.title: Viral clip shows IShowSpeed landing punch on fan during Puerto Rico appearance
articles.description: Popular streamer IShowSpeed's recent public appearance in Puerto Rico took a dramatic turn when a playful boxing-style moment with a fan went viral. During a meet-up, Speed landed a strong punch, causing the fan to stumble, which quickly ignited online discussions and exaggerated claims of a knockout. This incident highlights the unpredictable nature of his content tours.

articles.title: Sam Altman may have just agreed with Elon Musk but it is not about AI but having more ...
articles.description: AI titans Sam Altman and Elon Musk, usually rivals, share a surprising agreement on procreation. Altman, a new father, amplified a call for people to have more children, echoing Musk's long-held concerns about declining birth rates. Both tech leaders champion larger families, a stance that unites them despite their differing views on AI's future.

articles.title: How to heal your inner child: 10 psychology-backed things you need to hear
articles.description: That’s where the idea of the inner child comes in. Not as a trend, but as a way to understand why certain emotions feel so familiar, even now. And sometimes, the shift doesn’t come from big changes. It comes from the way you start talking to yourself in those moments.

articles.title: Boss silenced after employee’s daughter asks him one question: ‘Not the hero I deserved but...’
articles.description: A nine-year-old girl accidentally called her father's boss, making a heartfelt plea for a salary increase so her father could buy her a promised gift. The unexpected request left the manager speechless, but deeply moved her father, who realized his daughter's innocent faith and belief in him.

articles.title: Huma Qureshi To Marry Rachit Singh Soon? Secret Relationship, Wedding Plans Spark Buzz
articles.description: Actress Huma Qureshi is making headlines amid reports she may soon marry acting coach Rachit Singh. The two, believed to be dating for four years, have kept things private, sparking curiosity. Reports suggest an October-November wedding, likely intimate, followed by a Mumbai reception. They were recently spotted at events, including Sonakshi Sinha’s wedding, fuelling buzz. Earlier rumours also hinted at a US engagement.

articles.title: Sarkar in real life? The film where Vijay becomes Tamil Nadu’s CM is now reflecting in real life as TVK leads in 100+ seats

Echoing the rise he portrayed in Sarkar, Vijay is now emerging as a serious political force, with early leads putting established parties under pressure.

articles.title: 'Dhurandhar' star Ranveer Singh spotted in Shanoo Sharma’s intimate wedding as Bhumi Pednekar drops UNSEEN PICS
articles.description: Shanoo Sharma married in an intimate ceremony on April 25, and Bhumi Pednekar later shared wedding glimpses on Instagram. The photos showed Shanoo with her husband and included a brief Ranveer Singh appearance that was later removed. Bhumi’s emotional caption and Shanoo’s wedding announcement drew warm wishes from friends and fans.

Lead actress Sanjana Sanghi has revealed that the screenplay is ready and has garnered great enthusiasm from the team. The empowering journey of four women on a life-changing bike adventure struck a chord with audiences, and the follow-up aims to delve deeper into their lives.

articles.title: He dropped out of school in class 7, sold pens on streets, attempted suicide at age 13. Today, actor has a Rs 277 crore net worth
articles.description: Johnny Lever's life was marked by hardship before he became a celebrated comedian. He faced financial struggles and discontinued his education. A difficult period led him to a suicide attempt, but he chose life. His talent for mimicry earned him the name Johnny Lever. He left a stable job to pursue entertainment full-time.

articles.title: Anirudh Ravichander’s massive fee of Rs 15 crore for Nani starrer ‘The Paradise’ revealed - Reports
articles.description: Renowned composer Anirudh Ravichander, celebrated for his chart-topping melodies, is set to receive an impressive Rs 15 crore for his contribution to Nani's forthcoming film 'The Paradise.' This substantial fee highlights his elite status in the music industry, particularly following the success of his latest theme for 'AA23'.

This announcement comes on the heels of the show's revival, which will continue production, though without her fellow cast member Taylor Frankie Paul.
